positive: A minimalist, highly stylized graphic illustration of a majestic lion's head and mane, rendered in deep cobalt blue and vibrant burnt orange. The silhouette should be clean and strong, dominating the central composition. Include abstract, geometrically inspired floral elements and wisps of smoke wrapping around the mane for dynamic energy. Use a stylized woodcut or ink-wash graphic design aesthetic. High contrast, flat colors with subtle gradient shading, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Clean linework, vector art quality.
negative: text, logo, signature, watermark, writing, blur, noise, artifacts, low detail, multiple subjects, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, photorealism, 3d render
